context: Checks whether the agent catches build-time/runtime configuration mistakes, secret leakage, object-level authorization gaps, and unbounded telemetry cardinality.

checklist.name: Configuration phase proof
checklist.description: Determines whether the property is build-time fixed or runtime-resolved in the installed extension/code path and changes the source of truth rather than guessing a property name.

checklist.name: Token secrecy
checklist.description: Classifies full bearer-token logging as a security defect and removes/redacts it across failure paths without losing safe diagnostic context.

checklist.name: Authentication versus authorization
checklist.description: Distinguishes a valid support role from permission to access a specific tenant-owned account.

checklist.name: Ownership enforcement
checklist.description: Adds centralized tenant/object authorization with supervisor exception and positive/negative cross-tenant tests.

checklist.name: Metric cardinality
checklist.description: Identifies accountId as an unbounded label and replaces it with bounded dimensions while moving identifiers to controlled logs/traces when needed.

checklist.name: Logging and tracing design
checklist.description: Uses structured safe fields, correlation, terminal error recording, and redaction rather than duplicate exception logging.

checklist.name: Severity confidence evidence
checklist.description: Ranks token exposure and ownership bypass appropriately and cites code/config/contract evidence for each finding.

checklist.name: Smallest remedies
checklist.description: Keeps the four fixes local and avoids an unrelated auth or telemetry stack rewrite.

checklist.name: Verification gates
checklist.description: Includes runtime config behavior, log-capture/redaction, authorization matrix, and metrics-cardinality checks with exact commands or honest limitations.
